verificationNote: AI-generated indicative risk register for SOC 2 engagements. Risk scores are illustrative.
title: SOC 2 Risk Register
description: Register of risks to Trust Services Criteria compliance

risks.title: Unauthorized Access to Production Systems
risks.description: Unauthorized individuals gain access to production systems due to inadequate access controls or compromised credentials.
risks.treatmentPlan: Implement just-in-time access for production, deploy UEBA, enhance access review automation.

risks.title: Change Management Bypass
risks.description: System changes deployed without proper authorization, testing, or documentation, leading to service disruption or security vulnerabilities.
risks.treatmentPlan: Implement pipeline-enforced change gates, automate change documentation, deploy drift detection.

risks.title: Extended Service Outage
risks.description: Critical service becomes unavailable beyond committed SLA targets due to infrastructure failure or cyber incident.
risks.treatmentPlan: Implement multi-region failover, reduce RTO target, enhance chaos engineering program.

risks.title: Data Breach of Customer PII
risks.description: Personal information of customers is exposed through technical vulnerability, misconfiguration, or insider threat.
existingControls: Encryption at rest and in transit
risks.treatmentPlan: Deploy data discovery and classification, enhance DLP rules, implement tokenization for sensitive fields.

risks.title: Vendor Service Disruption
risks.description: Critical third-party vendor experiences outage or security incident that impacts service delivery.
risks.treatmentPlan: Identify and qualify alternative vendors for critical services, enhance vendor monitoring.

risks.title: Insufficient Monitoring Coverage
risks.description: Security events go undetected due to gaps in monitoring coverage, leading to delayed incident response.
risks.treatmentPlan: Expand SIEM log sources, implement detection engineering program, conduct purple team exercises.

risks.title: Processing Integrity Failure
risks.description: Data processing errors result in inaccurate outputs affecting customer operations or financial reporting.
risks.treatmentPlan: Implement automated reconciliation checks, enhance data quality monitoring.

risks.title: SOC 2 Observation Period Coverage Gap
risks.description: Controls are not operating effectively for the full observation period, resulting in audit exceptions or qualified opinion.
risks.treatmentPlan: Implement control health dashboard, conduct mid-period readiness checks, automate evidence collection.
